contents.title: Hi <<member_name>>, let's connect!
contents.body: Hi <<first_name>>! I just joined <<domain>> and noticed you're quite active. <<Would love to|Looking forward to>> connecting and learning from your experience. <<Feel free to say hi anytime|Don't be shy, say hi>>! 😊

contents.title: Hello <<first_name>> - nice to meet you
contents.body: Hey <<first_name>>! <<Newbie here|I'm new here>>, looking to make friends with <<seasoned|long-time>> members. <<Any tips for a beginner?|Got any advice for a newcomer?>> Looking forward to chatting! 😄

contents.title: Hey <<first_name>> 👋
contents.body: Hello <<first_name>>! <<Saw your recent posts|Notice you're active>> on <<domain>> and thought <<I'd introduce myself|let's connect>>. <<Hope we can have|Would love to have>> some <<great|awesome>> conversations! 🙌

contents.title: Greetings <<first_name>> from a new member
contents.body: Hi <<first_name>>, also <<a new member|new here>> myself. I see you post a lot of <<useful|helpful>> stuff on <<domain>> - would love to learn from you. <<Let's keep in touch|Let's stay connected>>! 🤝

contents.title: Hi <<member_name>> - fellow member here
contents.body: Hey <<first_name>>! <<I'm exploring|Just joined>> <<domain>> and noticed you're <<a long-time member|active here>>. <<Whenever you have time,|If you don't mind,>> would you mind sharing <<some tips|a few pointers>>? Thanks a lot! 🙏

contents.title: Hello <<first_name>> - glad to find you
contents.body: Hi <<first_name>>! <<Found you on|Came across your profile on>> <<domain>> and <<was impressed by your posts|thought we'd get along>>. <<I'm also new|Just signed up>>, <<let's connect|let's be friends>>! 🌟

contents.title: Hi <<first_name>> - introduction
contents.body: Hey <<first_name>>! <<Just dropping a quick hello|Sending you a friendly greeting>> from a new member of <<domain>>. <<Hope you|Hope to>> <<find this|finding this>> interesting and <<let's chat sometime|connect soon>>! 💡

contents.title: Greetings <<member_name>>!
contents.body: Hi <<first_name>>! I'm <<also active on|also into>> <<domain>> and <<noticed your contributions|saw you around>>. <<Would love to|Hope to>> <<collaborate|chat>> sometime. <<Take care|Have a great day>>! 🤗

contents.title: Hi <<first_name>> - connect with me
contents.body: Hi <<first_name>>! <<Just joined|New to>> <<domain>>, <<eager to learn|want to explore>> more. <<I can tell you're|I can see you're>> <<knowledgeable|experienced>> here. <<Mind sharing|Mind if I ask>> some <<tips|advice>>? 🌱

contents.title: Hello <<first_name>> 👋
contents.body: Hi <<first_name>>! <<A new member|New to the community>> here on <<domain>>. <<Saw|Spotted>> you're <<quite active|posting great content>> so I <<decided to reach out|wanted to say hi>>. <<Hope|Hope>> we can be <<friends|connected>>! ✨
